message:
fix(hooks): add patrol-formula-guard to DefaultOverrides for witness role

Closes gt-e47hxn deployment gap #1: patrol-formula-guard was missing from
sky__witness because it was only in on-disk override files, not in the
built-in defaults. Adding it to DefaultOverrides ensures all witness
targets (including new rigs) automatically get patrol-formula-guard
without manual override file configuration.

Gap #2 (mail-check missing from beads__witness and wyvern__crew) was
already resolved — both files have UserPromptSubmit hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
